overall.description: First-person exploration of a dark abandoned hospital or medical facility in a horror video game. The player navigates through dimly lit corridors with mixed red emergency and fluorescent lighting, passing medical equipment, graffiti-covered walls, and debris-filled rooms.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through the narrow red-lit corridor toward a doorway

entered.detail: red emergency lights illuminating the ceiling and walls of the narrow corridor
concrete block walls with pipes and panels
dark doorway at the end of the corridor leading to another area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow corridor bathed in red emergency lighting. The player moves forward through the confined concrete space toward a doorway at the end of the hall.

agents.ego_description: moving through the main corridor, passing medical equipment and graffiti-covered walls

overhead fluorescent light fixture providing white illumination

segments.scene_description: The player exits the red-lit corridor into a wider hospital hallway with mixed lighting. The walls feature graffiti tags, and a medical gurney sits abandoned on the right side as the player proceeds down the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark side corridor with minimal lighting

events.description: turns into a darker corridor with significantly reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: turning left into a dark corridor and proceeding cautiously with limited visibility

entered.detail: unlit doorway leading to an interior room
exposed pipes running along the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The player turns left into a narrow corridor with very low lighting, leaving the main hallway behind. Visibility drops significantly as they approach a dark doorway, with only minimal ambient light revealing the wall pipes and concrete surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: debris-filled room with broken floor and exit sign

metal storage shelves against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a room with significant debris covering the floor, including broken tiles and rubble. A red exit sign glows above a doorway in the distance, providing the primary light source as the player navigates through the hazardous area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark office or waiting area with scattered furniture

events.description: moves from debris room into darker office space with minimal visibility

agents.ego_description: exploring the dark office area, panning the camera to survey the surroundings with limited visibility

entered.detail: desks and chairs scattered in the dark room
faint red light visible in the far distance down a corridor

segments.scene_description: The player transitions into a dark office or waiting area with minimal lighting, leaving the debris room behind. Office furniture is barely visible in the darkness as the player continues exploring, with a faint red light visible in the distant corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, red-lit corridor into a series of increasingly dark and derelict medical spaces. It begins by pushing through a narrow concrete hallway bathed in red emergency lighting before exiting into a wider hospital corridor where graffiti-covered walls and an abandoned gurney appear under mixed lighting. The camera then turns left, shifting from the main hall into a dim, narrow passage where visibility drops significantly among exposed wall pipes. As the player moves through a dark doorway, the scene opens into a room filled with broken tiles and rubble, illuminated primarily by the glow of a distant red exit sign. Finally, the movement transitions from the debris-strewn area into a near-black office space where furniture is barely visible, ending with a faint red light glimmering in a far corridor.
